items.name: Arcane Treat XL
items.description: An extremely rare and glowing delicacy crafted from enchanted ingredients that increases your pet's exp by 100000 points.

items.name: Draught of the Broken Limit
items.description:
A viscous concoction distilled from saturation remains and doctrinal reagents.
It does not empower the body,it destroys the mechanism that decides when growth must stop.

items.name: Epic Draconic Soul Crystal
items.description: A jagged, pulsating crystal harvested from the heart-stone of a fallen drake. It hums with a low, rhythmic heat that makes weapon steel glow a faint cherry-red. While it grants immense power, used to increase the stats of equipements.

items.name: Forbidden Crystal
items.description: Preserved Forbidden arcane remains embedded in black crystal

items.name: Forbidden Manuscript
items.description: A proscribed text defining how arcane intake may continue after lawful limits collapse.

items.name: Hollow Star Core Dust
items.description: A residue of impossible weight taken from the outer shell of the Hollow Star Avatar.

items.name: Lucid Memory Shard
items.description: A bright shard of memory left untouched by distortion, grief, or false testimony.

items.name: Star-Split Glass Heart
items.description: The refracted heart-crystal of Astramaw, humming with broken observatory constellations.

items.name: Ashscript Hood
